text:
<https://trac.torproject.org/projects/tor/wiki/doc/PluggableTransports/obfs4proxy> redirects to <https://gitlab.torproject.org/legacy/trac/-/wikis/doc/PluggableTransports/obfs4proxy>, which directs readers to: 

<https://community.torproject.org/relay/setup/bridge/>
